basic_details.job_title: IIT Delhi Project Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Candidates with B.Tech/B.E. in Computer Science/Information Technology or BCA/MCA qualification along with 2 years of experience in Web development are eligible to apply for these Project Assistant (Tech.) vacancies. The email application process for IIT Delhi Project Assistant (Tech.) Recruitment 2026 has started and will remain open until 20 May 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: B.Tech/B.E. (Computer Science/Information Technology), BCA/MCA, 2 years experience in Web development
qualification.details: Essential: B.Tech/B.E. in Computer Science/Information Technology or BCA/MCA with minimum GPA 6/10 or 60% and at least two-year experience in Web development using Python (Django), React JS, Next JS, JavaScript, JQuery, RestAPI. Knowledge of databases (SQL, etc.). Familiarity with public transportation APIs (e.g., Google Maps API, OpenStreetMap, Leaflet, Mapbox), GTFS, multimodal routing. Desirable: Backend (Node.js/Express, Python/Django/Flask), APIs (REST/GraphQL), Cloud (AWS/Azure), Payment Integration (UPI/PayPal), UI/UX Design.

salary_details.pay_scale: Rs. 39,420 - Rs. 51,420/- p.m. plus HRA @ 27% Per Month
salary_details.details: Rs. 39,420 - Rs. 51,420/- p.m. plus HRA @ 27% Per Month

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for IIT Delhi Project Assistant Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 20-05-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIT Delhi Project Assistant (Tech.) recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your email application for the Project Assistant (Tech.) position at IIT Delhi is 20th May 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Project Assistant (Tech.) post?
faq.answer: Candidates should possess a B.Tech/B.E. in Computer Science/Information Technology or BCA/MCA with at least two years of experience in web development.

faq.question: Q3. What is the salary offered for the Project Assistant (Tech.) position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a salary ranging from Rs. 39,420 to Rs. 51,420/- per month, plus HRA at 27% per month.

faq.question: Q4. How can I apply for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Applications are to be submitted via email. Ensure you send your complete application with all necessary documents before the deadline.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q6. What is the total number of vacancies available?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy for the post of Project Assistant (Tech.) in this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Project Assistant (Tech.) role?
faq.answer: The selection process involves shortlisting of applications followed by an online interview.

faq.question: Q8. What is the project duration?
faq.answer: The project duration is up to 04 June 2028.

faq.question: Q9. Where is IIT Delhi located?
faq.answer: Indian Institute of Technology Delhi is located in New Delhi, Delhi, with the pincode 110016.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification?
faq.answer: The official notification can be accessed through the provided link in the 'Important Links' section of this article.
